name: Price Tracker
description: Paste a product URL and luma checks the price for you. Every check is saved so you get a full price-history graph — great for watching deals on Amazon, bol.com, and more.
details:
Paste a product page URL and Price Tracker checks the listed price, saving every check to build a history graph over time.

Use it to catch a deal before it disappears, or just to confirm a "sale" price is actually lower than what the item has cost in the past.
